message:
feat(service): enhance status provider and add metrics HTTP server

Add global status update helpers, metrics HTTP endpoint, and scheduler integration.

status_provider.rs changes:
- Add init_basic_status_provider() - creates and registers BasicStatusProvider, returns Arc
- Add BASIC_PROVIDER static for direct access to BasicStatusProvider instance
- Add global update helpers (update_status_volumes, update_status_scheduler_state, etc)
- Change default state from "unknown" to "initializing" (more accurate during startup)
- Enables any module to update status without threading Arc references

metrics.rs changes:
- Add serve_metrics_http() - async function to serve Prometheus metrics over HTTP
- Add spawn_metrics_http() - spawns dedicated thread with Tokio runtime for metrics server
- Serves metrics at configured bind address (e.g. 127.0.0.1:9090)
- Minimal HTTP implementation (no framework overhead)

scheduler_runtime.rs changes:
- Import global_metrics_snapshot from service::metrics
- Update status provider with metrics snapshot during tick()
- Pushes queue depth and active worker counts into metrics

Integration:
Service modules can now update status without direct provider access:
  update_status_volumes(discovered_volumes);
  update_status_scheduler_state(format!("DeepIdle, CPU 10%, queue 42"));

Related: dcb002a (BasicStatusProvider), c00.8.3 (metrics emission), c00.4.3 (scheduler runtime)
